subject: physics
title: 22M.1.HL.TZ1.33
question_html:
An object of mass m is launched from the surface of the Earth. The Earth has a mass M and radius r. The acceleration due to gravity at the surface of the Earth is g. What is the escape speed of the object from the surface of the Earth?

A.  gr

B.  2gr

C.  2Mgr

D.  2mgr
examiners_html: Options B and C were selected by a roughly equal number of candidates. Again, this is a situation where unit analysis is beneficial; options C and D would not produce units associated with speed (mass is already incorporated in the constant 'g').
